name: docs-cockpit
description: Aggregate scattered project markdown (PRD, spec, plan, RFC, tasks, README, session memory) into ONE file:// openable HTML cockpit — sidebar nav, in-page rendering, optional YAML-frontmatter-driven kanban + KPI dashboard. Ships THREE skills (auto-triggered): `docs-cockpit` (set up / maintain), `docs-cockpit-status` (read state.json + standup queries), `docs-cockpit-update` (auto-upgrade). Plus THREE slash commands for explicit invocation: `/docs-cockpit:build`, `/docs-cockpit:status`, `/docs-cockpit:update`. No server, no Docusaurus/Sphinx multi-page setup.
